creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
Hi, many thanks for checking out, this is how I am testing (working on my setup but maybe I only cover FreeBSD 14):

I installed poudriere using:

poudriere jail -c -j 14amd64 -v 14.0-RELEASE -a amd64

then I cd /usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/devel/gbump

there I fetch the patch:

fetch "https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=246986&action=diff&format=raw&headers=1" -o patch

I apply the patch with:

patch -p1 < patch

And then run make stage:
